NODES.title: EGB125
NODES.name: Design for Manufacture
NODES.desc: Explores the relationship between design, manufacturing processes, and material properties.

NODES.title: EGB121
NODES.name: Engineering Mechanics
NODES.desc: Foundational unit in statics and mechanics of materials for analyzing structures like cranes and bridges.

NODES.title: EGB120
NODES.name: Foundations of Electrical Eng.
NODES.desc: Introduces circuit analysis, measurement instruments, and practical applications of electrical energy.

NODES.title: MZB127
NODES.name: Eng. Mathematics & Statistics
NODES.desc: Covers multivariable calculus, differential equations, linear algebra, and statistics.

NODES.title: EGB214
NODES.name: Materials and Manufacturing
NODES.desc: Introduces engineering materials and how processing affects properties.

NODES.title: EGB314
NODES.name: Solid Mechanics
NODES.desc: Intermediate study of internal stresses and strains in solid bodies.

NODES.title: EGB323
NODES.name: Fluid Mechanics
NODES.desc: Fundamentals of fluid flows, hydrostatics, and energy/momentum equations.

NODES.title: MZB221
NODES.name: Advanced Eng. Mathematics
NODES.desc: Integral transforms, calculus, and linear algebra for engineering applications.

NODES.title: EGB210
NODES.name: Fundamentals of Mechanical Design
NODES.desc: Integrating mechanics, solids, fluids, and materials into systematic design.

NODES.title: EGB322
NODES.name: Thermodynamics
NODES.desc: Thermodynamic principles applied to engines, power plants, and refrigeration.

NODES.title: EGB211
NODES.name: Dynamics
NODES.desc: Motion of particles and rigid bodies for machines and vehicles.

NODES.title: QUT YOU
NODES.name: 2x 6CP Options
NODES.desc: Two 6-credit point university-wide modules.

NODES.title: EGB101
NODES.name: Engineering Design & Prof. Practice
NODES.desc: Introduces the engineering design process, technical analysis, and professional attributes like ethics and teamwork.

NODES.title: EGB102
NODES.name: Fundamentals of Eng. Science
NODES.desc: Introduces core concepts of physics and strength of materials (forces, motion, energy, stress, strain).

NODES.title: EGB103
NODES.name: Computing and Data for Engineers
NODES.desc: Teaches design and implementation of simple algorithms to solve engineering problems and automate tasks.

NODES.title: MZB125
NODES.name: Introductory Eng. Mathematics
NODES.desc: Covers elementary functions, derivatives, integrals, complex numbers, vectors, and matrices.

NODES.title: Minor 3
NODES.name: Minor Unit
NODES.desc: Third unit of your chosen minor.

NODES.title: EGH414
NODES.name: Stress Analysis
NODES.desc: Response of components to loads and use of Finite Element Method (ANSYS).

NODES.title: EGH421
NODES.name: Vibration and Control
NODES.desc: Analysis and control of dynamic behavior and PID controller design.

NODES.title: EGH490-1
NODES.name: Research Project 1
NODES.desc: Capstone unit involving independent research and project management.

NODES.title: Minor 4
NODES.name: Minor Unit
NODES.desc: Fourth unit of your chosen minor.

NODES.title: EGB499
NODES.name: Work Placement Experience
NODES.desc: Capstone professional practice unit. Report submission after 450 hours of placement.

NODES.title: EGH422
NODES.name: Heat Transfer
NODES.desc: Fundamentals of conduction, convection, radiation, and mass diffusion.

NODES.title: EGH423
NODES.name: Fluid Dynamics
NODES.desc: Viscous, transient flows; pumps and turbines; CFD.

NODES.title: EGH490-2
NODES.name: Research Project 2
NODES.desc: Continuation of independent research.

NODES.title: EGB316
NODES.name: Design of Machine Elements
NODES.desc: Advanced design analysis using standards and Finite Element Analysis (ANSYS).

NODES.title: Minor 1
NODES.name: Minor Unit
NODES.desc: First unit of your chosen minor.

NODES.title: EGB321
NODES.name: Dynamics of Machines
NODES.desc: Dynamics and vibration of machines, position/velocity analysis.

NODES.title: QUT YOU
NODES.name: 2x 6CP Options
NODES.desc: Two 6-credit point university-wide modules.

NODES.title: EGH420
NODES.name: Mechanical Systems Design
NODES.desc: Final design unit analyzing complex systems (safety, ethics, sustainability).

NODES.title: Discipline
NODES.name: Extension Unit Option
NODES.desc: Discipline specific extension unit.

NODES.title: Minor 2
NODES.name: Minor Unit
NODES.desc: Second unit of your chosen minor.

NODES.title: EGH404
NODES.name: Research in Eng. Practice
NODES.desc: Engineering research methods, literature review, and data visualization.
